text: Confirm Felix's individual Prototype Fund eligibility and funding setup
description: Verify the formal checklist against the current Jahrgang 03 rules: adult individual developer, residence and taxes in Germany, self-employed/freelance during the project or proportionally released from employment, no company as grant recipient, and no conflicting public financing for the same work. Record the intended tax/self-employment setup and clarify any uncertainty with Prototype Fund before investing heavily in the application.

status.comment: Felix must confirm residence, German tax status, employment/self-employment situation, and overlapping funding.
